name: Historic Fighters
short_description: Historic Fighters is a single-player turn-based game. Pick a class of fighters ranging from warriors from ancient Sparta to gun-wielding cowboys and win battles!
detailed_description:
Historic Fighters is a turn-based game that allows you to play with a historically themed class of your choice in a fantasy battle setting. Each of the eight classes (Amazon, Pirate, Viking, Ninja, Samurai, Cowboy, Spartan, Knight) have three character types: Fighter (melee attack), Range (multi-target range attack) and Healer.


Pick your favourite class of Historic Fighters and win battles!
about_the_game:
